title: Navigate the Viva Main Overview and Open Subscreens
summary: Use the Viva main overview screen as the home screen for system overview and navigation. From this screen, the operator can review the overall layout, use the Main Menu to open listed subscreens, and click available layout icons for more information on system areas.
when_to_use: Use when an operator needs to start from the Viva home overview screen, review overall system visibility, navigate to the listed subscreens, or open more information for the Tippers, Hospital, or GLDS areas from the system layout.
not_for: Do not use for navigation paths beyond the Main Menu items and clickable icons explicitly named in the source.
Do not use as a corrective or troubleshooting procedure beyond the source-provided tip to click "ACB1— AMR TT" if a subscreen does not update.
Do not assume additional actions, controls, or follow-on behavior not described in the source.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: View the Viva main overview, use the Main Menu to open listed subscreens, review the visible system layout, and click supported icons for more information.

safety_notes: This source-supported procedure is limited to viewing and navigation actions on the Viva overview screen.
Do not assume additional control actions from the overview beyond what is explicitly described in this runbook.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Viva HMI main overview screen
Main Menu on the Viva overview
Clickable system layout icons for Tippers, Hospitals, and GLDS

access_required: Access to the Viva main overview screen
system_preconditions: The Viva overview screen is available to view
The Main Menu is visible on the overview screen

visual_references.description: Training video frame showing the Viva overall system main overview screen, main menu area, and system layout used for navigation.

steps.title: Open or view the Viva main overview screen
steps.purpose: Establish the correct home screen for system overview and navigation.
steps.instruction: Open or view the Viva main overview screen identified in the source as the home screen for system overview and navigation.
steps.expected_result: The Viva main overview screen is visible and can be used as the starting point for navigation.
steps.healthy_condition: The main overview screen is displayed and presents overall system visibility and navigation options.
steps.failure_condition: The main overview screen is not visible or the operator cannot confirm that the displayed screen is the Viva home overview.

actions.label: View Viva main overview
actions.exact_action: Open or view the Viva main overview screen identified as the home screen for system overview and navigation.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Viva overall system main overview screen used as the home screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the Viva main overview screen cannot be accessed or identified from the available display.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Presenter says this is the Viva screens main overview from Hazlet; OCR states purpose is home screen for system overview and navigation.

steps.title: Use the Main Menu to open listed subscreens
steps.purpose: Navigate from the overview screen to the subscreens explicitly listed in the source.
steps.instruction: Use the Main Menu on the Viva overview to navigate to the available subscreens listed in the source: Detail, Statistics, HMI Calculations, API, and RMS.
steps.expected_result: The selected subscreen opens from the Main Menu.
steps.healthy_condition: The Main Menu shows the listed subscreen options and the selected view updates to the chosen subscreen.
steps.failure_condition: The expected subscreen does not open or the screen does not update after selecting a listed menu option.

actions.label: Select subscreen from Main Menu
actions.exact_action: Use the Main Menu to navigate to available subscreens listed in the source, including Detail, Statistics, HMI Calculations, API, and RMS.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Main Menu area showing the listed subscreen options: Detail, Statistics, HMI Calculations, API, and RMS.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the expected subscreen does not open after selecting a listed Main Menu option.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR text lists main menu navigation to subscreens: Detail, Statistics, HMI Calculations, API, and RMS.

steps.title: Review the system layout area
steps.purpose: Confirm the major system areas visible from the overview screen.
steps.instruction: Review the system layout area on the Viva overview and identify the areas shown in the source: Sorter, Tippers, Hospital, and GLDS.
steps.expected_result: The operator can see the system layout and identify the named areas.
steps.healthy_condition: The system layout is visible and shows Sorter, Tippers, Hospital, and GLDS.
steps.failure_condition: The system layout is not visible or the named areas cannot be identified on the overview.

actions.label: Inspect system layout
actions.exact_action: Review the system layout area showing Sorter, Tippers, Hospital, and GLDS.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The system layout area showing Sorter, Tippers, Hospital, and GLDS.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the overview does not show the expected system layout areas.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR text says system layout shows Sorter, Tippers, Hospital, and GLDS, with clickable icons for more information.

steps.title: Click layout icons to open more information
steps.purpose: Open additional information for supported system areas directly from the overview layout.
steps.instruction: Click the icons for Tippers, Hospitals, or GLDS on the system layout to open more information for those areas.
steps.expected_result: More information opens for the selected Tippers, Hospital, or GLDS area.
steps.healthy_condition: Clicking a supported icon opens additional information for that area.
steps.failure_condition: Clicking a supported icon does not open more information or the display does not update.

actions.label: Open area details from layout icon
actions.exact_action: Click the icons for Tippers, Hospitals, or GLDS to open more information for those areas.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The system layout icons for Tippers, Hospital, and GLDS that can be clicked for more information.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if clicking a supported icon does not open more information.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR text says system layout shows Sorter, Tippers, Hospital, and GLDS, with clickable icons for more information.

steps.title: Use the source-provided refresh tip if a subscreen does not update
steps.purpose: Apply the only source-provided action for a subscreen that does not update.
steps.instruction: If a subscreen does not update, click "ACB1— AMR TT" as noted in the source tip.
steps.expected_result: The subscreen updates after using the source-provided tip.
steps.healthy_condition: The display updates after clicking "ACB1— AMR TT."
steps.failure_condition: The subscreen still does not update after clicking "ACB1— AMR TT."

actions.label: Click ACB1— AMR TT
actions.exact_action: If a subscreen does not update, click "ACB1— AMR TT" as noted in the source tip.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the expected subscreen does not update after clicking "ACB1— AMR TT."

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The source includes a specific tip to click "ACB1— AMR TT" if a subscreen does not update, but does not explain why or what follows.

success_criteria: The Viva main overview is used as the starting screen for system overview and navigation.
The operator can open the listed Main Menu subscreens: Detail, Statistics, HMI Calculations, API, and RMS.
The operator can identify the system layout areas: Sorter, Tippers, Hospital, and GLDS.
The operator can click supported layout icons to open more information for Tippers, Hospital, or GLDS.
healthy_conditions: The Viva main overview screen is visible.
The Main Menu displays the listed subscreen options.
The system layout shows Sorter, Tippers, Hospital, and GLDS.
Supported icon selections open more information.
If needed, clicking "ACB1— AMR TT" causes the subscreen to update.
failure_conditions: The Viva main overview screen cannot be accessed or identified.
A listed Main Menu subscreen does not open.
The system layout or named areas are not visible.
Clicking a supported icon does not open more information.
The subscreen still does not update after clicking "ACB1— AMR TT."
escalation_guidance: If the expected subscreen does not update after using the source-provided tip, escalate for additional support.
Escalate if the operator cannot access the Viva main overview or cannot open the listed subscreens.
Escalate if the displayed behavior requires navigation or corrective actions not described in the source.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall Viva main overview screen, Main Menu subscreen options, and system layout icons.

missing_details: The source does not provide a time estimate for this procedure.
The source does not specify whether production stop or LOTO is required.
The source does not explain why clicking "ACB1— AMR TT" refreshes the subscreen or what internal behavior follows.
The source does not define additional troubleshooting steps if the subscreen still does not update.
The source does not identify supporting roles or approval requirements.
